headline: 2 Reasons to Watch ZBRA and 1 to Stay Cautious
summary: While the S&P 500 is up 13.2% since November 2025, Zebra (currently trading at $246.68 per share) has lagged behind, posting a return of 8%. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
